Functions
merge_class
procedure merge_class(
p_fcl_id 
in fsm_classes_v.fcl_id%type,
p_fcl_type_name 
in fsm_classes_v.fcl_type_name%type,
p_fcl_name 
in fsm_classes_v.fcl_name%type,
p_fcl_description 
in fsm_classes_v.fcl_description%type,
p_fcl_active 
in boolean
 default 
true
)

Creates or modifies a class.

Parameters
p_fcl_id
in fsm_classes_v.fcl_id%type

ID of the class

p_fcl_type_name
in fsm_classes_v.fcl_type_name%type

Name of the implementing SQL object type. Must exist as an instantiable subtype of FSM_TYPE

p_fcl_name
in fsm_classes_v.fcl_name%type

Plain text identifier of the class

p_fcl_description
in fsm_classes_v.fcl_description%type

Description of the class

p_fcl_active
in boolean

Optional flag indicating whether the class should be used (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

delete_class
procedure delete_class(
p_fcl_id 
in fsm_classes_v.fcl_id%type,
p_force 
in boolean
 default 
false
)

Used to remove a class and optionally all its associated events, states and transitions

Parameters

p_fcl_id  ID of the class p_force - Optional flag indicating whether all referenced objects should also be deleted (TRUE) or not. Default: FALSE

merge_sub_class
procedure merge_sub_class(
p_fsc_id 
in fsm_sub_classes_v.fsc_id%type,
p_fsc_fcl_id 
in fsm_sub_classes_v.fsc_fcl_id%type,
p_fsc_name 
in fsm_sub_classes_v.fsc_name%type,
p_fsc_description 
in fsm_sub_classes_v.fsc_description%type,
p_fsc_active 
in boolean
 default 
true
)

Creates or modifies a class.

Parameters
p_fsc_id
in fsm_sub_classes_v.fsc_id%type

ID of the subclass

p_fsc_fcl_id
in fsm_sub_classes_v.fsc_fcl_id%type

ID of the parent class

p_fsc_name
in fsm_sub_classes_v.fsc_name%type

Plain text identifier of the subclass

p_fsc_description
in fsm_sub_classes_v.fsc_description%type

Description of the subclass

p_fsc_active
in boolean

Optional flag indicating whether the subclass should be used (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

delete_sub_class
procedure delete_sub_class(
p_fsc_id 
in fsm_sub_classes_v.fsc_id%type,
p_fsc_fcl_id 
in fsm_sub_classes_v.fsc_fcl_id%type,
p_force 
in boolean
 default 
false
)

Used to remove a subclass and optionally all its associated transitions

Parameters
p_fsc_id
in fsm_sub_classes_v.fsc_id%type

ID of the sub_class

p_fsc_fcl_id
in fsm_sub_classes_v.fsc_fcl_id%type

ID of the parent class

p_force
in boolean

Optional flag indicating whether all referenced transitions should also be deleted (TRUE) or not. Default: FALSE

merge_status_group
procedure merge_status_group(
p_fsg_id 
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_id%type,
p_fsg_fcl_id 
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_fcl_id%type,
p_fsg_name 
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_name%type,
p_fsg_description 
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_description%type,
p_fsg_icon_css 
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_icon_css%type
 default 
null,
p_fsg_name_css 
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_name_css%type
 default 
null,
p_fsg_active 
in boolean
 default 
true
)

Creates or modifies a status group

Parameters
p_fsg_id
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_id%type

ID of the status group

p_fsg_fcl_id
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_fcl_id%type

Reference to FSM_CLASSES

p_fsg_name
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_name%type

Display name of the status group

p_fsg_description
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_description%type

Description of the status group. May be used in tooltips

p_fsg_icon_css
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_icon_css%type

Optional CSS-class to decorate status group with an icon

p_fsg_name_css
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_name_css%type

Optional CSS-class to decorate status group name

p_fst_active

Optional flag to indicate whether this status group is actually used or not. Defaults to TRUE.

delete_status_group
procedure delete_status_group(
p_fsg_id 
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_id%type,
p_fsg_fcl_id 
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_fcl_id%type,
p_force 
in boolean
 default 
false
)

Deletes a status group and optionally all pending states and transitions.

Parameters
p_fsg_id
in fsm_status_groups_v.fsg_id%type

ID of the status group

p_force
in boolean

Optional flag indicating whether all pending statuses and their transitions should also be deleted (TRUE) or not. Default: FALSE

merge_status_severity
procedure merge_status_severity(
p_fss_id 
in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_id%type,
p_fss_fcl_id 
in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_fcl_id%type,
p_fss_name 
in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_name%type,
p_fss_description 
in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_description%type,
p_fss_html 
in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_html%type,
p_fss_icon 
in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_icon%type
)

Creates a status severity representation. Main focus is to map PIT severities to FSM severities such as Milestone or similar.

Parameters
p_fss_id
in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_id%type

Numeric severity as defined in PIT, ranges from 10 .. 70 in increments of 10

p_fss_fcl_id
in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_fcl_id%type

Reference to FSM_CLASSES.

p_fss_name
in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_name%type

Display name of the severity

p_fss_html
in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_html%type

HTML expresssion for display purposes

p_fss_icon
in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_icon%type

HTML CSS classes to display a status icon

delete_status_severity
procedure delete_status_severity(
p_fss_id 
in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_id%type,
p_fss_fcl_id 
in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_fcl_id%type
)

Deletes a status severity.

Parameters
p_fss_id
in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_id%type

Numeric severity as defined in PIT, ranges from 10 .. 70 in increments of 10

p_fss_fcl_id
in fsm_status_severities_v.fss_fcl_id%type

Reference to FSM_CLASSES.

merge_status
procedure merge_status(
p_fst_id 
in fsm_status_v.fst_id%type,
p_fst_fcl_id 
in fsm_status_v.fst_fcl_id%type,
p_fst_fsg_id 
in fsm_status_v.fst_fsg_id%type,
p_fst_name 
in fsm_status_v.fst_name%type,
p_fst_description 
in fsm_status_v.fst_description%type,
p_fst_severity 
in fsm_status_v.fst_severity%type,
p_fst_msg_id 
in fsm_status_v.fst_msg_id%type
 default 
msg.FSM_STATUS_CHANGED,
p_fst_retries_on_error 
in fsm_status_v.fst_retries_on_error%type
 default 
0,
p_fst_retry_schedule 
in fsm_status_v.fst_retry_schedule%type
 default 
null,
p_fst_retry_time 
in fsm_status_v.fst_retry_time%type
 default 
null,
p_fst_warn_interval 
in fsm_status_v.fst_warn_interval%type
 default 
null,
p_fst_alert_interval 
in fsm_status_v.fst_alert_interval%type
 default 
null,
p_fst_escalation_basis 
in fsm_status_v.fst_escalation_basis%type
 default 
'STATUS',
p_fst_icon_css 
in fsm_status_v.fst_icon_css%type
 default 
null,
p_fst_name_css 
in fsm_status_v.fst_name_css%type
 default 
null,
p_fst_initial_status 
in boolean
 default 
false,
p_fst_terminal_status 
in boolean
 default 
false,
p_fst_active 
in boolean
 default 
true
)

Creates or modifies a status.

Parameters
p_fst_id
in fsm_status_v.fst_id%type

ID of the status

p_fst_fcl_id
in fsm_status_v.fst_fcl_id%type

Reference to the class the status belongs to

p_fst_fsg_id
in fsm_status_v.fst_fsg_id%type

Reference to a status group

p_fst_name
in fsm_status_v.fst_name%type

Display name of the status

p_fst_description
in fsm_status_v.fst_description%type

Description of the status. May be used in tooltips

p_fst_severity
in fsm_status_v.fst_severity%type

Severity of the status, reference to FSM_STATUS_SEVERITIES_V

p_fst_msg_id
in fsm_status_v.fst_msg_id%type

Optional name of the message used for logging

p_fst_retries_on_error
in fsm_status_v.fst_retries_on_error%type

Optional number of retries allowed to enter this status

p_fst_retry_schedule
in fsm_status_v.fst_retry_schedule%type

Optional schedule if a retry is executed. Controls when this retry takes place

p_fst_retry_time
in fsm_status_v.fst_retry_time%type

Optional duration in seconds the retry is hold back

p_fst_warn_interval
in fsm_status_v.fst_warn_interval%type

Optional lower threshold before the status is considered WARN

p_fst_alert_interval
in fsm_status_v.fst_alert_interval%type

Optional upper threshold before the status is considered ALERT

p_fst_escalation_basis
in fsm_status_v.fst_escalation_basis%type

Determines whether elapsed time is measured from status entry (STATUS) or from the last successful event/activity (EVENT)

p_fst_icon_css
in fsm_status_v.fst_icon_css%type

Optional CSS-class to decorate status with an icon

p_fst_name_css
in fsm_status_v.fst_name_css%type

Optional CSS-class to decorate status name

p_fst_initial_status
in boolean

Optional flag to indicate whether this status is the first to enter at creation time (TRUE) or not (FALSE). Defaults to FALSE.

p_fst_terminal_status
in boolean

Optional flag to indicate whether this status is terminal/final (TRUE) or not (FALSE). Defaults to FALSE.

p_fst_active
in boolean

Optional flag to indicate whether this status is used (TRUE) or not (FALSE). Defaults to TRUE.

delete_status
procedure delete_status(
p_fst_id 
in fsm_status_v.fst_id%type,
p_fst_fcl_id 
in fsm_status_v.fst_fcl_id%type,
p_force 
in boolean
 default 
false
)

Deletes a status and optionally all pending transitions

Parameters
p_fst_id
in fsm_status_v.fst_id%type

ID of the status

p_fst_fcl_id
in fsm_status_v.fst_fcl_id%type

Reference to the class the status belongs to

p_force
in boolean

Optional flag indicating whether all pending transitions should also be deleted (TRUE) or not. Default: FALSE

merge_event
procedure merge_event(
p_fev_id 
in fsm_events_v.fev_id%type,
p_fev_fcl_id 
in fsm_events_v.fev_fcl_id%type,
p_fev_name 
in fsm_events_v.fev_name%type,
p_fev_description 
in fsm_events_v.fev_description%type,
p_fev_msg_id 
in fsm_events_v.fev_msg_id%type
 default 
msg.FSM_EVENT_RAISED,
p_fev_raised_by_user 
in boolean
 default 
false,
p_fev_command_label 
in fsm_events_v.fev_command_label%type
 default 
null,
p_fev_button_icon 
in fsm_events_v.fev_button_icon%type
 default 
null,
p_fev_button_highlight 
in boolean
 default 
false,
p_fev_confirm_message 
in fsm_events_v.fev_confirm_message%type
 default 
null,
p_fev_active 
in boolean
 default 
true
)

Creates or modifies an event.

Parameters
p_fev_id
in fsm_events_v.fev_id%type

ID of the event

p_fev_fcl_id
in fsm_events_v.fev_fcl_id%type

Reference to the class the event belongs to

p_fev_name
in fsm_events_v.fev_name%type

Display name of the event

p_fev_description
in fsm_events_v.fev_description%type

Description of the event. May be used in tooltips

p_fev_msg_id
in fsm_events_v.fev_msg_id%type

Optional name of the message used for logging. Defaults to msg.FSM_EVENT_RAISED

p_fev_raised_by_user
in boolean

Optional flag to indicate whether this event has to be raised by human interaction

p_fev_command

Optional name of a command.

p_fev_button_icon
in fsm_events_v.fev_button_icon%type

Optional icon for a command button

p_fev_button_highlight
in boolean

Optional flag to indicate whether this is a default option

p_fev_confirm_message
in fsm_events_v.fev_confirm_message%type

Optional message that is shown as a confirmation message before executing the command

p_fev_active
in boolean

Optional flag to indicate whether this event is used (TRUE) or not (FALSE). Defaults to TRUE.

delete_event
procedure delete_event(
p_fev_id 
in fsm_events_v.fev_id%type,
p_fev_fcl_id 
in fsm_events_v.fev_fcl_id%type,
p_force 
in boolean
 default 
false
)

Deletes an event and optionally all pending transitions

Parameters
p_fcl_id

ID of the event

p_fev_fcl_id
in fsm_events_v.fev_fcl_id%type

Reference to the class the event belongs to

p_force
in boolean

Optional flag indicating whether all pending transits should also be deleted (TRUE) or not. Default: FALSE

merge_transition
procedure merge_transition(
p_ftr_fst_id 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fst_id%type,
p_ftr_fev_id 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fev_id%type,
p_ftr_fcl_id 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fcl_id%type,
p_ftr_fsc_id 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fsc_id%type
 default 
'MASTER',
p_ftr_fst_list 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fst_list%type,
p_ftr_raise_automatically 
in boolean,
p_ftr_raise_on_status 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_raise_on_status%type
 default 
fsm.C_OK,
p_ftr_required_role 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_required_role%type
 default 
null,
p_ftr_active 
in boolean
 default 
true,
p_run_checks 
in boolean
 default 
true
)

Creates or modifies a transition

Parameters
p_ftr_fst_id
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fst_id%type

Reference to the status

p_ftr_fev_id
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fev_id%type

Reference to the event

p_ftr_fcl_id
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fcl_id%type

Reference to the class

p_ftr_fsc_id
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fsc_id%type

Reference to the sub class. Defaults to MASTER

p_ftr_fst_list
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fst_list%type

':'-separated list of status that can be reached when raising the given event

p_ftr_raise_automatically
in boolean

Optional flag to indicate whether this event is to be called automatically (TRUE) or not.  If FALSE, the transition waits for the event to be fired externally.

p_ftr_raise_on_status
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_raise_on_status%type

Optional flag to indicate whether this transition is fired upon normal execution (C_OK) or in case of an error (C_ERROR). Defaults to fsm.C_OK

p_ftr_required_role
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_required_role%type

Optional reference to a role that is required to perform this transition

p_ftr_active
in boolean

Optional flag to indicate whether this transition is actually used. Defaults to TRUE

p_run_checks
in boolean

Optional flag to defer metadata checks during bulk installation. Defaults to TRUE

delete_transition
procedure delete_transition(
p_ftr_fst_id 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fst_id%type,
p_ftr_fev_id 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fev_id%type,
p_ftr_fcl_id 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fcl_id%type,
p_ftr_fsc_id 
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fsc_id%type
 default 
'MASTER'
)

Deletes a transition

Parameters
p_ftr_fst_id
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fst_id%type

Reference to the status

p_ftr_fev_id
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fev_id%type

Reference to the event

p_ftr_fcl_id
in fsm_transitions_v.ftr_fcl_id%type

Reference to the class

create_status_package
procedure create_status_package

Method to create a constant package for all status

check_metadata
procedure check_metadata(
p_fcl_id 
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fcl_id%type,
p_fsc_id 
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fsc_id%type
)

Method checks whether the metadata inserted for a class are consistent.

Parameter
p_fcl_id
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fcl_id%type

ID of the class to check

p_fsc_id
in fsm_objects_v.fsm_fsc_id%type

ID of the subclass to check

Throws
FSM_NO_INITIAL_STATUS_ERR

if no initial status is defined

FSM_TOO_MANY_INITIALS_ERR

if more than one initial status is defined

FSM_MULTIPLE_AUTO_EVENTS_ERR

if more than one event is raised automatically from the same status

FSM_UNREACHABLE_STATUS_ERR

if an active status cannot be reached from any initial status

FSM_DEAD_END_STATUS_ERR

if a reachable status has no active outgoing transition

get_class_diagram
function get_class_diagram(
p_fcl_id 
in fsm_classes_v.fcl_id%type,
p_fsc_id 
in fsm_sub_classes_v.fsc_id%type
 default 
'MASTER'
)
return clob

Generates a Mermaid flowchart for a class/subclass configuration.

Parameters
p_fcl_id
in fsm_classes_v.fcl_id%type

ID of the class

p_fsc_id
in fsm_sub_classes_v.fsc_id%type

ID of the subclass, defaults to MASTER

Returns

Mermaid flowchart text as CLOB
